data.name: Hentai Pop Star
data.detailed_description:
Step into a dazzling neon stage where a stunning anime idol is ready to reveal much more than her sweet smile — but only to those talented enough to complete her puzzles. Hentai Pop Star is an erotic puzzle game where every finished challenge unveils intimate, seductive artwork of our irresistible idol.


Vibrant lights, sensual energy, and beautifully drawn adult illustrations blend together to create an addictive, mood-boosting experience you’ll keep coming back to.

Game Features:

1. Erotic Idol Illustrations

Unlock steamy artwork featuring the pop star in provocative poses and dazzling concert-themed scenes.
Each puzzle solved brings you closer to her curves, expressions, and star-powered allure.

2. Three Puzzle Modes

• 15-Puzzle (Sliding Puzzle) – Classic mechanic with an enticing twist.
• Swipe Puzzle – Drag, swap, and assemble the idol piece by piece.
• Rotate Puzzle – Adjust and align tiles to reveal her most tempting moments.

3. Two Difficulty Levels

• 3×3 – Quick, fun, and satisfying reveals.
• 4×4 – More challenging, more teasing, and even more rewarding.

4. Sensual Background Music

Soft, vibrant idol-themed melodies heighten the erotic mood and draw you deeper into the sparkling neon world of the pop star.

data.short_description: Hentai Pop Star is an erotic puzzle game where each completed level reveals new seductive artwork of a stunning anime idol. Neon vibes, satisfying gameplay, and beautifully drawn illustrations create an addictive experience you'll keep coming back to.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 10100F/AMD Ruzen 3 3100
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1060/RX 480
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
